creator: y4gr5rzn@FreeBSD.org
text:
Kernel panic (kmem_map too small) when extracting large .tar archive on ZFS :'-(

Arch i386, 2 gb ram, 2x500gb sata hdd, ath wifi...

Modules loaded:
sound, snd_hda, snd_ich, acpi, zfs, pflog, pf, blank_saver.
PF can be disabled or enabled.

How-To-Repeat: Make tar archive ~8 gb on ZFS;
tar -xf arc.tar;
wait 3-7 minutes...
